Room.title: Room
Room.description: Monopoly game room configuration and banker assignments

id.description: 6-digit unique alphanumeric or numeric string representing the room code.

name.description: Name given to the room by the host player.

initialBalance.description: The amount of starting capital for each player.

bankerPlayerId.description: The custom player ID representing the host/banker.

createdAt.description: Datetime represented as standard milliseconds epoch.

updatedAt.description: Datetime represented as standard milliseconds epoch.

Player.title: Player
Player.description: A player who has joined the room with their local identification details.

id.description: Unique string created on this device to persist sessions under localStorage.

avatar.description: Emoji representing their board game piece icon (e.g. 🎩, 🚗).

color.description: Hex or Tailwind class string representing player custom theme.

isBanker.description: Flags whether the user has administrator and banker tools.

fromId.description: The ID of of origin player, or 'bank' if it's external bank-led give/take.

fromName.description: Name of the sending party or '銀行'.

toId.description: Name of the receiver's party or '銀行'.

amount.description: Floating point money currency value transferred in this record.

type.description: Type of operation (giving from bank, taking, peer transfer, or system restart).

/rooms/{roomId}.description: Direct root collection of all Monopoly electronic rooms.

/rooms/{roomId}/players/{playerId}.description: Sub-ledger recording members participating within this room instance.

/rooms/{roomId}/transactions/{transactio.description: Audit-logged micro-transactions synced multi-client for display.
